_about: Per-niche Theme Presets for this master. A Theme Preset is a named bundle of theme-tab values (colors + fonts + button radius) + the header nav color + a bug icon. Apply = deep-merge preset.theme into data['theme'], preset.header into data['header'], and generate a wordmark logo + favicon in the preset's colors with preset.icon (a bug from multisite/icons/, Apache-2.0 Noto Emoji) as an accent silhouette on a dark tile. Assignment per site: CSV 'theme_preset' column = id or name; blank = hash(domain) % count. See memory feedback_theme_naming + project_multisite_visual_styles.

presets.name: Classic
presets.note: Dark indigo + orange, rounded — the master's own palette. Cockroach mark.

presets.name: Bold
presets.note: Charcoal + red, sharp corners. Ant mark.

presets.name: Fresh
presets.note: Forest green + amber, pill buttons. Spider mark.

presets.name: Trust
presets.note: Teal-navy + teal, medium radius. Mosquito mark.
